candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line; preferable to Total Revenue because Total Revenue includes Other operating income.
Broader revenue total that appears to include Other operating income; less preferred for pure sales.
This is COGS, not revenue.
This is COGS, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use Revenue as primary top-line. Total Revenue is secondary in case reporting label changes; it appears to include Other operating income, so it is lower priority.

candidates.why: Standard direct cost line matching COGS.
Also clearly matches COGS; appears duplicate of Cost of sales.

variables.notes: Chose Cost of sales as the primary COGS label. Cost of revenues/COGS appears to be a duplicate row with identical values.

candidates.why: Likely operating overhead component and not a subtotal.
Appears related to lease/right-of-use depreciation or asset category, not SG&A overhead.
Potential overhead bucket, but preview is empty so unclear how complete it is.
Explicit SG&A label exists, but preview is empty; per rules it should still be included when present.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty in preview, so included it plus the closest overhead bucket per hierarchy rule. Excluded Total operating expenses because it is a subtotal and includes depreciation/amortisation. Excluded Lease Assets, External as it appears asset/lease-related rather than SG&A.
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible on the income statement.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line that includes interest and possibly other non-interest items; fallback only.
Most specific and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest subcomponent for lease liabilities; useful fallback if main interest line unavailable.
Too broad/unclear and often non-interest.
Specific interest-related line, though likely a smaller subcomponent.
Generic preferred label, but preview is empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure, not preferred over primary reported lines.

variables.notes: Priority order favors the most specific recurring interest-expense line first, then a generic interest label if used in other years, then broader Financial expenses as fallback if that is all that is reported.

candidates.why: Best available equity line; no separate parent/owners equity line is shown.
Could include minority interest, so less preferred for BE when MIB exists separately.
Balancing/subtotal row, not a reported equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: No parent-only equity line is visible, so Total equity is the best BE proxy. To avoid double counting, MIB is left empty.

candidates.why: This is a combined total, not a standalone minority-interest line, so it is not suitable for MIB.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest/non-controlling interests line is visible. Because BE uses Total equity, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
